feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Integrating SAP S/4HANA Cloud with Google Workspace
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

 

We have a requirement to integrate with Google Workspace. 

1. Let us know the whole process.

2. How do we access Google Console.

3. Need help with achieving this integration.

 

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Can we develop custom Adobe Forms from Scratch and Deploy the same to S4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Currently we are implementing S4HANA Public Cloud Version 2402 for a client and the requirement is to develop Custom Adobe Form from scratch for Service Entry Sheets. Could you please let me know if we can do this in Public Cloud and if yes how can we execute this? How to develop the user interface to trigger the developed form?

Note: This post is not about extending any existing Form Templates provide by SAP.

entry.title: S4CLOUD : Adobe Form - Purchase Order Item Text not DISPLAYED
entry.content:
Experts, 

We are using S4 HANA CLoud environment 2402 - There is already a custom form configured for Purchase order , i am not able to see the PO item text within form output even though its binded with value : $.PurchaseOrderHeaderTextElement.

How should i debug and analyse ? 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility SAP Interactive Forms by Adobe SAP Forms service by Adobe

entry.title: SAP S/4 Hana Cloud: Testing Form Development
entry.content:
Team,

I am trying to download the .XML file that includes the sample data from Purchase Order using syntax -'#&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&#'. but getting below error and upon continuing this error and bypassing using continue nothing happenned.

 

Followed the below thread - 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-s-4-hana-cloud-testing-form-developments-in-adobe-livecycle-designer/ba-p/13416953

entry.title: Creating Custom BO with upload function like 'Import Supplier Invoices' App in S4hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to create a custom business object with upload function like Import Supplier Invoices App in S4Hana Cloud system.

Is it possible to create that kind of custom business object using Key User (In App) Extensibility or Developer (On Stack) Extensibility using ADT?

Or any workaround exist?

Could you please provide any idea?

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Set Initialize Value for Purchase Order in S4HANA
entry.content:
I would like to initialize values for custom fields in this BAdI MM_PUR_S4_PO_INITIALIZE.

But I can't call the custom fields in this BAdI. Is there any ways to call custom fields in this BAdI?

entry.title: Import Sales Order Extension
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I have a specific requirement for the Import Sales Order Fiori application.
where in, I have below 3 requirements. 

1. Extend the VBAP and VBAK data with custom fields - (Its already achieved and working through CFL so I am good here. )

2. I also need some custom fields to be appended in the VBKD field from the CFL - But this is not possible only through CFL as the business contexts etc is not available for VBKD..... 
Ques - How can this be achieved. 

2.1 Also, there are some standard fields of VBKD which is required for filling up the data through the download template but those fields are not available in the underlying main CDS view, so not able to use them as well. 
Ques - What is the best approach here?

4. I have a custom table which also needs to be amended with some data from the download template of fiori screen. 

Ques - Is it possible? What is the best approach here? 

On-Prem system

entry.title: Is PO Item Text output within form can be controlled at Purchase organization level ?
entry.content: In S4 HANA Public cloud , Is there is a functionality where we can restrict printing a Purchase order item text in the form layout with respect to Purchase Organization ?

entry.title: Custom CDS View with several dependencies deprecated
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

The Primary Datasource of a CDS view is deprecated and we are having several CDS views that are dependent on this view that also have CDS views that are dependent on this. There is no way to just replace the primary data source without causing issues for the other CDS views?

 

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Using Database Tables created using RAP in Custom Fields
entry.content:
Hello,

We have created a Report Using RAP in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud, we want to use the key field  from this report as a Value Help(F4) into a custom field on sales order screen. The Database table when view in "View Browser" is released for both "Key User" and "Cloud Development"

 

 

but when we go to create a "Custom Field Based on CDS" the respective view is not displayed. Even if we try creating a Custom CDS View this view is not available.

Thanks and Regards,

Ashish Talekar

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility @Expert

entry.title: S/4HANA cloud extensibility service on BTP - not available?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm struggling a little bit. I'm working on an event mesh implementation from S4Public Cloud. I'm trying to connect a BTP environment to receive events. But here is the case:

- I already linked my S4HPC environment to the BTP using the Tokens. The system is registered in BTP

My main goal now is to activate the entitlements to use the cloud extensibility. Somehow I'm not able to assign those.

so unless I have not assigned this to  a subaccount, I'm not able to generate communication arrangements and actually create the link to the system. (item 7)

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/enable-events-from-s-4hana-cloud-to-event-mesh/ba-p/13559401

 

Any ideas? I do have all roles in BTP and S4HPC and the cpea credits are there. I watched the tutorial of Antonio @ajmaradiaga  but I just can't get it to work.

All the best

Laurens

entry.title: Creation of catalogs in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

 

I appreciate your collaboration with the following queries.

1. Creation and modification of business catalogs in S/4HANA Public Cloud.
2.Search for applications available in S/4HANA Public Cloud. I currently do not find applications with Customer Project Factsheet or the catalog that contains this application.


Thanks! 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to implement custom number range for Invoices for rent?
entry.content:
We have a requirement where we need to implement a custom number range for the Invoices for rent. The standard number range object RERAINV is set to reset the number range every new fiscal year which does not comply with our statutory requirements. This standard number range object is not released so we can't update this nor we can do anything on the config. 

Do we have any extensibility options for this? I found BAdi BADI_RERA_INVOICE where it might be possible via method GET_NUMBER. Unfortunately, this BAdi is not released as well so it is not available in the Custom Logic app.

System: SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2402

entry.title: How to transport Developer Extensibility objects?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

I created some CDS views using ABAP Development Tools and I want to transport it to Test System. 

How can I do it?

 

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Starter Customizing Tentant and Starter Development tenant not sync?
entry.content:
We have 2 starter systems, Starter Customizing Tenant and Starter Development Tenant. All the data and configuration is in the Starter customizing tenant and never uses the Starter Development tenant at all.

We have a need to implement BAdI for the supplier invoice workflow and BAdI implementation is only can implement in the Starter Development Tenant, whereas in the Starter Development Tenant there is no data and configuration like in the Starter Customizing Tenant. then how to overcome this? Meanwhile, the starter customizing tenant and the starter development tenant cannot be in sync.

Sorry because this is our first time implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition. If there are any errors in the views and stages I explained above, please correct them further.

Thank You!

entry.title: Public Cloud - Product Pictures on Sales Quotation Output Form
entry.content:
Dear Community,

we have the requirement that in the Sales Quotation Output Form not only the standard fields should be displayed but a product picture as well.

Our current struggle: There is no binding in the standard data binding to include product images. When looking at the data source extension there is also no way to include this.

Has anyone experience with this requirement and can exist or has an idea and can share this with me?

Thank you so much in advance.

entry.title: Error: To create a mapping, use the development system (3SL) or Q system (2SL).
entry.content:
Hi,

I´m triying to use the App Renumber G/L Accounts but i get this message:To create a mapping, use thSAP HANA Cloud, SAP Adaptive e development system (3SL) or Q system (2SL).

I have SAP S/4Hana Cloud 2402, i saw the note SAP 3289450 - Error ' To create a mapping, use the development system (3SL) or Q system (2SL) in 'Renumber G/L Accounts' but the Resolution says:System working as Designed

entry.title: Use Custom Business Object Data for CDS Views in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello together, 

i have following use case: I need to use some of the fields of my custom business object in Eclipse to create a new view and do further calculations with these values. I have already maintained the catalogues for the CBO and created an other cds view on the basis of the CBO like a workaround, but it did not help. I always get the error in Eclipse IDE that the usage of the CDS-Entity is not allowed.

Is there a possible solution for this?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Expose CDS View as OData Service/API in S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hello together,

i have created a CDS View in Eclipse in my ABAB Cloud Project in S/4HANA Cloud and now i want to expose the CDS View as an OData Service / External API to use it in the Integration Suite. How can i achieve this? I am working in a Development Tenant.

Best regards

entry.title: Call SeriesService_GetDocumentSeries in Service Layer javascript
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

i having issue on how to get document series list in service layer (javascript). i can not call this SeriesService_GetDocumentSeries in service layer.

is there any way to get document series in service layer?

Thank you.
